summary: Iteration 90 testing complete. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Home page shows full name + designation (CEO), IT & Assets module visible on home grid, IT Assets page with Add Asset button and stats cards, Task Manager page with Assign Task button and task list, Task Manager link in sidebar under My Self-Service section.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 90 features fully tested. Key verifications: 1) GET /api/auth/me returns designation field enriched from hr_employees collection. 2) GET /api/hr/task-categories returns 13 categories: Marketing, Development, Design, Content, Admin, IT, Web Development, Video Editing, Script Writing, Quality Control, Sales, Customer Service, Other. 3) Task CRUD endpoints work: POST /api/hr/tasks creates task with title/priority/category/assigned_to, GET /api/hr/tasks returns list, PUT /api/hr/tasks/{id} updates status, DELETE /api/hr/tasks/{id} deletes. 4) IT Assets CRUD endpoints work: GET /api/it/assets returns list, POST creates asset, PUT updates, DELETE removes. 5) GET /api/hr/my-attendance-for-date returns attendance record and shift info. 6) COO role has same access as super_admin via require_roles function (line 998) and check_permission function (line 1007). 7) Sales user correctly denied access to IT assets (403) but can access their assigned tasks. 8) Frontend: Home page shows 'Welcome, {name}!' with designation below (CEO for aqib), IT & Assets module visible on home grid, IT Assets page at /it/assets with Add Asset button and 4 stats cards, Task Manager page at /hr/tasks with Assign Task button and task list, Task Manager link in sidebar under My Self-Service section.

auth_me_designation.details: GET /api/auth/me returns designation field. For CEO user, designation is 'CEO' enriched from hr_employees collection.

task_categories.details: GET /api/hr/task-categories returns 13 categories including IT, Web Development, Video Editing, Script Writing as required.

task_management_crud.details: All task CRUD operations work: create with title/priority/category/assigned_to, get list, update status, delete.

it_assets_crud.details: All IT assets CRUD operations work: get list, create asset, update asset, delete asset.

attendance_for_date.details: GET /api/hr/my-attendance-for-date returns attendance record and shift info for regularization modal.

coo_access.details: COO role has same access as super_admin. Verified in require_roles (line 998) and check_permission (line 1007).

role_based_access.details: Sales user correctly denied access to IT assets (403 Forbidden) but can access their assigned tasks.

home_page_welcome.details: Home page shows 'Welcome, Aqib (Super Admin)!' with 'CEO' designation displayed below the name.

it_assets_home_grid.details: IT & Assets module visible on home page grid with Monitor icon.

it_assets_page.details: IT Assets page at /it/assets renders with Add Asset button and 4 stats cards (Total Assets, In Use, Available, Maintenance).

task_manager_page.details: Task Manager page at /hr/tasks renders with Assign Task button, 4 stats cards (Total, Open, In Progress, Completed), and task list.

task_manager_sidebar.details: Task Manager link visible in sidebar under My Self-Service section.
